parentQuestion: The movement of substances across the membrane without any energy input from the...

scaffolds.q: Substances naturally move from areas of ___ concentration to areas of ___ concentration.
scaffolds.explain: This is diffusion — substances naturally spread out from areas of high concentration to low concentration. This movement happens spontaneously without energy input. Think of perfume spreading through a room. Absorb this:the inevitability of it.

scaffolds.q: The main energy currency used by cells is ___.
scaffolds.explain: ATP — adenosine triphosphate — is the primary energy currency of cells. When ATP is broken down to ADP, energy is released for cellular processes. It's the cell's wallet. spend it wisely.
